nodes.label: Home Screen — Meta Banner + App Blocker (spacing-02-mid-sections iteration)
nodes.description: Home tab showing full scroll from top: community challenge banner '30 días sin redes sociales — el reto que está cambiando la mente de 2,400 mentexianos' with 'Unirme al reto' CTA and pagination dots. Greeting 'Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para tu ritual de hoy?' with subtitle. Duration picker row (pencil icon, 1h, 2h, 3h, 4h). Section 'Mejora tu concentración' with social app toggles (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook) all OFF. Spacing between mid-sections is the focus of this design iteration.

nodes.label: Community Challenge Banner — '30 días sin redes sociales'
nodes.description: Carousel banner at top of Home tab showing active community challenge: '30 días sin redes sociales'. Subtitle: 'El reto que está cambiando la mente de 2,400 mentexianos'. CTA button 'Unirme al reto' with arrow icon. Pagination dots below indicate multiple challenge cards. Teal accent on background card. Social proof via participant count (2,400 mentexianos).

nodes.label: Session Duration Picker — pencil + 1h/2h/3h/4h row
nodes.description: Horizontal pill/chip row for selecting focus session duration. Options: pencil icon (custom), 1h, 2h, 3h, 4h. Allows user to set intended focus session length before starting a ritual. Part of the Home screen ritual setup flow.
